summary: Iteration 9: All NEW features tested and working. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All 4 new features verified - Fee structure (trade 0.3% + platform 0.2%), TON chain tokens, Dark/Light mode toggle, Auth button consolidation. Mobile responsive verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features from this iteration are verified and working: 1) Fee structure with trade_fee 0.3% + platform_fee 0.2% for purchases >= Rp 50k, 2) TON chain added with Toncoin and USDT.TON tokens, 3) Dark/Light mode toggle using data-theme attribute and CSS variables, 4) Auth button consolidated with 'Login / Sign up' dropdown menu.

backend_api_tests.signup_new_user: PASSED - POST /api/auth/signup creates user and returns token
backend_api_tests.signin_success: PASSED - POST /api/auth/signin works with test@meridiant.com / Test1234!
backend_api_tests.get_prices_includes_ton: PASSED - TON_IDR, IDR_TON, USDT.TON_IDR, IDR_USDT.TON all present

frontend_ui_tests.theme_toggle_back_to_dark: PASSED - Second click switches back to 'dark'
frontend_ui_tests.fee_display_100000: PASSED - Shows Trade fee (0.3%) Rp 300, Platform fee (0.2%) Rp 200, Total ~Rp 500
frontend_ui_tests.fee_display_30000: PASSED - Shows Trade fee (0.3%) Rp 90, NO platform fee, Total ~Rp 90
frontend_ui_tests.ton_token_picker: PASSED - Searching 'TON' shows Toncoin (TON) and Tether (USDT.TON) with TON network badge
frontend_ui_tests.light_mode_renders: PASSED - Hero text readable, form card visible in light mode
frontend_ui_tests.mobile_input_overflow: PASSED - Large numbers (99999999) stay within input bounds
frontend_ui_tests.mobile_theme_toggle: PASSED - Theme toggle works on mobile
frontend_ui_tests.mobile_menu_auth: PASSED - Sign in / Sign up buttons visible in mobile menu

fee_structure.details: Trade fee 0.3% always applied for IDR->crypto transfers. Platform fee 0.2% applied only when amount >= Rp 50,000. Backend returns trade_fee, platform_fee, total_fee in transaction response. Frontend displays fee breakdown correctly.

ton_chain_support.details: TON added to networks list, Toncoin (TON) and USDT.TON in cryptoCurrencies. GET /api/prices returns TON_IDR=50000 and USDT.TON_IDR=16400. Token picker shows TON tokens with network badge when searching 'TON'.

dark_light_mode.details: Dark mode is default. Theme stored in localStorage as 'mrd-theme'. Toggle uses data-theme attribute on documentElement. CSS variables defined in index.css for both themes. Light mode properly hides space elements and adjusts shadows.

auth_button_consolidation.details: Single 'Login / Sign up' button with dropdown containing Sign In and Sign Up options. Uses data-testid='auth-toggle-btn' for main button, 'signin-btn' and 'signup-btn' for dropdown items. Mobile has separate buttons in hamburger menu.
